reasoning_content: I'm checking which token types appear in the mini-performance cases since the default task excludes the performance/llm-* categories, so I only need to focus on the functional test cases and mini-performance.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && find build/test/task1/mini-performance -name 'answer.txt' 2>/dev/null | head -3 && find build/test/task1/mini-performance -name 'answer.txt' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && find build/test/task1/mini-performance -name 'answer.txt' 2>/dev/null | head -3 && find build/test/task1/mini-performance -name 'answer.txt' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Mini-perf token kinds"}
